question_count.number: Question count must be a number

time_limit_seconds.number: Time limit must be a number

refresh_token.string: Refresh token must be a string

old_password.string: Old password must be a string

new_password.string: New password must be a string
new_password.min_length: New password minimum length is {min} characters

level.order_positive: Order must be a positive number

text.string: Question text must be a string
text.max_length: Question text maximum length is {max} characters

section_id.string: Section ID must be a string

specialization_id.string: Specialization ID must be a string

difficulty.enum: Difficulty must be EASY, MEDIUM, or HARD

tags.string: Each tag must be a string

options.min_size: Question must have at least 2 options

option_text.string: Option text must be a string
option_text.min_length: Option text minimum length is {min} characters
option_text.max_length: Option text maximum length is {max} characters

is_correct.boolean: Is correct must be true or false

option_explanation.string: Option explanation must be a string
option_explanation.min_length: Option explanation minimum length is {min} characters
option_explanation.max_length: Option explanation maximum length is {max} characters

option_order.integer: Option order must be an integer

mode.enum: Exam mode must be SIMULATION or PRACTICE

title.string: Exam title must be a string
title.min_length: Exam title minimum length is {min} characters
title.max_length: Exam title maximum length is {max} characters

section_id.uuid: Section ID must be a valid UUID

specialization_id.uuid: Specialization ID must be a valid UUID

question_id.uuid: Question ID must be a valid UUID

selected_option_id.uuid: Selected option must be a valid UUID

image_url.string: Image URL must be a string
image_url.max_length: Image URL must be at most {max} characters
image_url.min_length: Image URL must be at least {min} characters

bio.too_long: Bio must be at most {max} characters

name.min_length: Name must be at least {min} characters
name.max_length: Name must be at most {max} characters

message.min_length: Message must be at least {min} characters
message.max_length: Message must be at most {max} characters
